name: Grasshopper Parfaits
recipeIngredient: 12 each Cream filled chocolate Sandwich cookies -- coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small mixing bowl, whip cream until soft. Add sugar and beat until stiff.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat cream cheese until fluffy. Gradually beat in sweetened condensed milk. Stir in lemon juice and liqueurs.
3. Fold in whipped cream; chill for 20 minutes.
4. In parfait glasses, layer 1 tablespoon cookies and 1/4 cup filling. Repeat layers.
5. Top with remaining cookies. Chill for 4 hours.
Variations:
Coffee: Substitute coffee-flavored liqueur for Creme de menthe.
Brandy Alexander: Substitute 1/3 brandy for Creme de menthe.
Orange: Omit Creme de cacao and substitute 1/4 cup orange liqueur for Creme de menthe.
